target_cmd: curl -s https://www.solaceagi.com/compare | grep -E -o '(OpenClaw|Browser.Use|Bardeen|Playwright|Vercel|Claude Computer Use)' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | python3 -c "import sys; lines=sys.stdin.read().strip().split('\n'); named=[l for l in lines if l.strip()]; print('COMPETITORS_NAMED:', len(named), '|', ' '.join(n.split()[-1] for n in named if n.strip()))"
